listings.title: 2 Sunn alnico transducer 12"s with baffle
listings.body: in five days these go back These are CTS (Chicago Telephone Supply) Sound is excellent. Bright and efficient. Probably each are 20 -25 watts but could be more. Great for low watt (60 watts or below) tube amps even though they came from the Sunn Dymos which was a solid state amp. call only

listings.title: Empty Macallan Single Malt Scotch Whiskey Bottles
listings.body: (2) Macallan - 12 yr Sherry Oak Cask in Box I sold some of these here on CL and see these selling on eBay for $10 each Thanks

listings.title: Japanese Patinated Bronze Ryobu Torii Gate Bookends
listings.body: A pair of patinated bronze bookends modeled as Ryobu-style torii gates with curved top rails and secondary support pillars. Each gate features a central rectangular plaque inscribed with Japanese kanji characters referencing the Itsukushima Shrine. The metal displays a dark brown patina with golden tones visible on the undersides of the rectangular bases. Green felt protective pads are attached to the corners of each base. - h. 5 x w. 3 x l. 5 in. Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/hkLNxaWmqetxwyUQNYmx_A/JAPANESE-PATINATED-BRONZE-RYOBU-TORII-GATE-BOOKENDS

listings.title: (2pc) Art Nouveau Silver Plated Mounted Glass Claret Jug and Match Pew
listings.body: The claret jug features a tapered glass body with diamond-cut patterns and silver-plated Art Nouveau mounts with whiplash motifs. The jug includes a hinged lid with a thumb-lift finial and a curved handle bearing electroplate hallmarks. The cruet consists of a glass bottle with a clear stopper set into a pewter holder with a shell-form handle. The pewter holder is marked on the underside with a Match brand label and a series of stamped touchmarks. - h. 12 x dia. 5.25 in. (Diameter at bottom of Large Pitcher) Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/yLYlpTx3uzA_LM-9j7sDnw/ART-NOUVEAU-SILVER-PLATED-MOUNTED-GLASS-CLARET-JUG-AND-MATCH-PEWTER-CRUET
